summary: I was charged twice for my April subscription. Please refund one of the charges.
suggested_action: Review billing records and provide refund, invoice, or payment guidance.

summary: The app crashes every time I try to export the monthly report. Error 500 shows up.
suggested_action: Collect diagnostics, reproduce the issue, and route to technical support if needed.

summary: Failed login after password reset due to expired verification code
suggested_action: Resend verification code and try login again

summary: My package says delivered but nothing arrived at my door. Tracking number FL-88217.
suggested_action: Check tracking and delivery status, then update the customer with next steps.

summary: Do you support SSO for enterprise teams, and can someone send pricing?
suggested_action: Send pricing or product information and offer a sales follow-up.

summary: Customer requesting plan cancellation at end of billing cycle
suggested_action: Cancel subscription at end of billing cycle

summary: Customer reports suspicious account activity, including a strange login email and unauthorized billing card change.
suggested_action: Immediately lock the account and initiate a password reset. Contact the customer to verify their identity and investigate the incident.

summary: Customer is unhappy with delayed support response and requests a manager
suggested_action: Escalate to a manager for immediate assistance

summary: Unknown issue
suggested_action: Contact billing support for further assistance

summary: Customer needs assistance with a general inquiry
suggested_action: Provide general information or point to relevant resources

summary: Blank dashboard on Chrome, works on mobile
suggested_action: Try clearing browser cache and check for Chrome updates

summary: Customer unable to access account
suggested_action: Try resetting password or contact support for further assistance

summary: Customer is requesting homework assistance
suggested_action: Provide general guidance on writing a chemistry homework introduction

summary: Incorrect company address on invoice
suggested_action: Verify and update the company address on the invoice

summary: API sync failed for all orders, preventing order processing
suggested_action: Investigate API sync logs for errors and restart the API service

summary: Customer claims advertised feature is not available in their plan
suggested_action: Verify customer's plan details and provide refund if feature is indeed missing

summary: Customer requests account deletion and data removal
suggested_action: Escalate to account management team for immediate action

summary: Feature comparison for different plans
suggested_action: Check our pricing page for detailed information

summary: Courier delivery issue with address validation
suggested_action: Verify address with customer and re-attempt delivery

summary: Potential data leak detected in customer export
suggested_action: Immediately investigate and contain the data leak, notify affected customers, and implement corrective measures to prevent future incidents

summary: Customer experiencing technical difficulties
suggested_action: Escalate to technical support team for immediate assistance

summary: Customer did not receive receipt after payment by card
suggested_action: Resend receipt to customer's email

summary: Login page redirect loop after email entry
suggested_action: Check browser cache and cookies, try clearing them and attempt login again

summary: Request for demo for large support team
suggested_action: Schedule demo for next week

summary: Customer dispute over billing after cancellation
suggested_action: Review and resolve billing discrepancy as soon as possible

summary: Failed payment with card debit
suggested_action: Contact our payment support team to investigate and refund the transaction

summary: Shipment stuck in warehouse for 10 days
suggested_action: Investigate warehouse status and resolve the issue

summary: Product deleted saved view, causing issue with boss
suggested_action: Restore saved view and investigate cause of deletion

summary: Password reset email not received
suggested_action: Check email account settings and resend password reset email

summary: Customer seeking a joke about customer support
suggested_action: Provide a joke about customer support

summary: Request to update email address due to employee departure
suggested_action: Verify employee departure and update email address

summary: Mobile app timeout when uploading photos over hotel Wi-Fi
suggested_action: Check hotel Wi-Fi connection and try uploading photos again. If issue persists, restart the mobile app.

summary: Request to pause billing for two months due to office closure
suggested_action: Contact billing support to discuss temporary suspension

summary: Login issue
suggested_action: Check username and password, and try resetting password if necessary

summary: Potential phishing attempt via WhatsApp
suggested_action: Verify the authenticity of the request and report to our security team if suspicious

summary: Missing device in order
suggested_action: Verify order status and contact shipping carrier to locate missing device

summary: Duplicate rows in CSV export and mismatched totals
suggested_action: Verify data source and re-export CSV

summary: Zendesk and Slack integration inquiry
suggested_action: Provide information on existing integrations

summary: Customer account locked during launch, resulting in lost sales
suggested_action: Escalate to account security team to investigate and resolve the issue

summary: Request for JSON output
suggested_action: No action required
